Work with me My story
Orville X. Davis
Educator · Builder · Speaker

A Teacher Who Builds

His work bridges the classroom and the marketplace — so what he teaches actually ships.

Orville X. Davis is a lecturer at the SUNY Brooklyn Educational Opportunity Center, where he helps adult learners build practical, future-ready skills. He's a voice in AI education — speaking on AI literacy, prompt engineering, and using AI as a co-pilot rather than an autopilot, including at the CUNY City Tech AI Symposium.

Beyond the lectern, Orville is a hands-on entrepreneur and web developer who has launched and operated multiple ventures across logistics, services, and community impact. He believes the best teachers are still in the arena — building, shipping, and learning in public.

Ventures & Initiatives

Building Across Industries

Orville doesn't just talk about entrepreneurship — he practices it. Here's a look at the ventures and causes he leads and supports.

Service Business

Scrap-It! Junk Removal

A junk-removal company serving the Tri-State area out of Rockville Centre, NY — built on reliable service, clean operations, and a customer-first reputation.

Founder / Operator
Technology

XtraSpec Technologies

A technology venture building practical software and AI-driven tools — turning the skills Orville teaches into products that solve real problems for clients and communities.

Founder
Nonprofit

Black Lotus Foundation

A nonprofit centered on workforce development, mentorship, and youth empowerment — opening doors for the next generation of builders and leaders.

Founder / Supporter
Talks & Workshops

Insights That Move People Forward

From a 30-minute keynote to a hands-on training, Orville makes complex technology clear, practical, and immediately usable. His sessions help students, educators, and teams adopt AI with confidence — not hype.

› AI Literacy › Prompt Engineering › Co-Pilot vs. Autopilot AI › AI in Education › Assignment Redesign › Entrepreneurship
